# Opra

> Opra builds operational infrastructure for growing businesses in Pretoria, South Africa, and remotely across SA and internationally.

## What Opra Does

Opra helps agencies, startups, consulting firms, recruitment firms, and operationally heavy businesses (1-50 people) replace manual processes with modern operational systems. The result: less time lost to admin, full visibility over operations, and systems that scale with the business.

## Services

- **Websites:** Operational websites with lead capture, CRM integration, and routing. From single-page sites to full multi-page operational hubs.
- **Platforms:** Client portals, dashboards, admin and ops systems, reporting hubs, and lightweight business applications.
- **Automation:** CRM integrations, client onboarding flows, reporting automation, lead routing, and approval workflows.
- **AI Systems:** Practical AI built into real workflows: proposal generation, document parsing, email triage, and internal knowledge systems.

## Who Opra Serves

Target clients are businesses experiencing operational growing pains:
- Agencies and creative studios
- Recruitment and staffing firms
- Consulting and advisory firms
- Startups building operational infrastructure
- Any business with 1-50 people growing fast enough that manual processes are visibly costing time and money

## Location & Coverage

- **Based in:** Pretoria, South Africa
- **Serves:** South Africa and internationally (remote)

## Contact

- **Email:** johnathan@opra.co.za
- **Consultation:** Free discovery call. Book via the website.
- **Response time:** Within 4 hours during business hours
